summary.description: FlashIt guided reuse mapping documenting consumption of hardened assets from PHR and Digital Marketing (DMOS)
summary.recommendation: FlashIt stays planning-only; consume PHR privacy/audit assets and the DMOS retry/DLQ pattern when shaping resumes.
summary.blockReason: FlashIt is not yet release-ready (mobile lifecycle disabled, web lifecycle in validation)

phrAssetConsumption.description: PHR assets recommended for FlashIt when healthcare-adjacent features are needed

assets.applicability: High - personal learning data and deck sharing need explicit consent boundaries
adaptationRequired: Replace healthcare language with personal learning and deck-sharing language

assets.applicability: High - sync and privacy operations need a user-visible audit trail
adaptationRequired: Generalize patient-visible audit language to learner-visible sync and deck access events

assets.applicability: High - offline mutations must preserve tenant and principal metadata
adaptationRequired: Adapt from healthcare mutations to offline flashcard sync replay

dmosAssetConsumption.description: Digital Marketing (DMOS) assets highly applicable to FlashIt marketing content workflows

assets.applicability: High - offline sync and notification delivery require retry and dead-letter handling
adaptationRequired: Adapt connector retry budgets to mobile/offline sync retry budgets

blockers: FlashIt web lifecycle is not yet validated in staging
FlashIt has not completed foundation usage profile validation

nextSteps.step: Evaluate PHR consent patterns for FlashIt content ownership

yappcIntegration.blockMessage: FlashIt is a candidate product not yet ready for guided asset reuse. Complete web lifecycle validation first.
